code: import{useEffect,useState}from'react';import{POSTS_ENDPOINT}from'./constants';export default function usePosts(){const[posts,setPosts]=useState([]);const[isLoading,setIsLoading]=useState(true);const[error,setError]=useState('');useEffect(()=>{setIsLoading(true);setError('');fetch(POSTS_ENDPOINT).then(response=>{if(!response.ok){throw new Error('Failed to load posts');}return response.json();}).then(data=>{setPosts(data);setIsLoading(false);}).catch(fetchError=>{setPosts([]);setError(fetchError.message||'Failed to load posts');setIsLoading(false);});},[]);return{posts,isLoading,error};}
